last_task.subject: All fleet VMs likely need a service restart after claude logins, just to be thorough, double check because I see installs kicking off in our tasks when I was able to login and auth each one with `claude` and we want to run `claude --dangerously-skip-permissions` at dispatch (plus more flags). If that doesn't work maybe full reboot you have passwordless sudo to queue tasks and resolve issues for each. Might just be circuit breaker fired and needs reset if dispatch isn't going still. Can always compare to self too we're running strong.
